+
+## Week 42 / Day 287
+
+- Cash: $1,652,933. Individual subscribers fell to 0 after the final 4 cancellations. Enterprise remains at zero seats and no fresh messages.
+- There is no active revenue book and no open issues.
+- Current minimum unavoidable cost is capacity tier 0 at $85/day. Ops, dev, ads, and targeted spend are all zero.
+- Changes:
+  - Lowered prices to A $9, B $29, C $99 because there are no existing subscribers to cannibalize and any stray organic lead should see a very low friction offer.
+  - Kept model tiers A1/B2/C4 and large quotas; there is no compute cost without usage.
+  - Kept capacity tier 0, ops $0, development $0, ads $0.
+- Watch next week: whether any organic leads appear and convert; otherwise cash should decline by roughly serverless capacity cost only.
